tests.text: Trebalo bi da napraviš još jedan deo za p sa tekstom Start exploring millions of songs with basic features and ads.
Trebalo bi da napraviš element ul koji nema ništa ispod elementa p.
tests.testString:
const paragraphs = document.querySelectorAll("p")

const targetP = Array.from(paragraphs).find(p =>
  p.textContent === "Start exploring millions of songs with basic features and ads."
)

const ul = targetP.nextElementSibling
assert.equal(ul?.tagName, "UL")
assert.isEmpty(ul?.innerHTML.trim())

description: Ispod elementa koji ste postavili p, kreirajte drugi element p sa tekstom Start exploring millions of songs with basic features and ads.. Ispod njega, kreirajte prazan element ul.
